what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-9d83034f in the dragnet-development channel to a board item (item-60542ab3) as a board_items attachment, and records when it was added.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no additional body.
The target field uses a board:// URI pointing to item-60542ab3.
The added timestamp includes an explicit UTC offset.
The file id matches the filename stem.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with an id matching the filename.
References a board entity with a board:// URI scheme.
Records addition time as an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
notes: A dated dragnet-development channel attachment pointer that ties attachment att-9d83034f to board item 60542ab3.
questions: What does board item item-60542ab3 represent?
What content or artifact was originally attached?
Does board_items imply a comment, pin, reference, or something else?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose of linking a channel attachment to a board item matches the content; it is purely a reference record.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to record that a specific board item is associated with a channel attachment at a specific time, enabling later retrieval or audit of channel-to-board relationships.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped board-item reference within a channel attachment ledger, preserving the link between channel memory and a board entity without embedding the entity itself.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record of type board_items that links attachment att-9d83034f in the dragnet-development channel to board item item-60542ab3 and records its addition time.
intention_for_embedding: This record was created to associate a channel attachment with a specific board item for retrieval and audit.
